name: Editorial Luxury
tagline: Premium editorial deck with magazine spreads, oversized serif type, image frames, rules, and restrained gold accents.

palette.description: Soft stone background with black editorial type, ivory panels, muted gold, and occasional acidic chartreuse accents.

typography.style: High-contrast editorial serif with restrained modern sans.

best_for: Premium brand strategy, portfolio presentations, creative direction, luxury pitches, and decks where restraint and taste matter more than data density.
avoid_for: Dense operating reviews, technical system diagrams, or casual team updates that need speed over polish.

source_inspiration.name: Editorial Slides for Fashion & Luxury Brands
source_inspiration.notes: Original HTML template rebuilt from public visual direction only; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
